15.skipReason: CSS on FloatingTile requires the tile to have a configured content type (keyboard). Cannot set up programmatically.
15.notes: CSS rotate on keyboard FloatingTile. CSS resolution fails without proper tile content type.

18.notes: CSS tr/tr:hover selectors only work with a configured preset browser FloatingTile.
